# SRE_SERVICE_CONFIG.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - SRE Agent (A38) -- service-specific SLO thresholds
#   - Observability Setup Agent (A37) -- alert threshold configuration
#   - Performance Agent (A18) -- SLO context for incident analysis
#
# Override default SLO targets from PERFORMANCE_GUIDELINES.md here.
# Leave a field empty or commented out to use the default.
# Only override when this service has genuinely different requirements.
#
# DEFAULT TARGETS (from PERFORMANCE_GUIDELINES.md section 7):
#   P95 latency warning:   500ms
#   P95 latency critical:  1000ms
#   Error rate warning:    0.5%
#   Error rate critical:   1.0%
#   Availability:          99.9% (Standard tier)
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.

---

## Service tier

```
# Tier determines availability target and escalation urgency
# Options: critical (99.95%) | standard (99.9%) | best-effort (99.5%)
SERVICE_TIER=standard
```

---

## SLO overrides

```
# Uncomment and adjust only if this service differs from defaults.
# Include a reason comment for any override.

# P95_LATENCY_WARNING_MS=500
# P95_LATENCY_CRITICAL_MS=1000
# Reason: [Why this service needs different thresholds]

# ERROR_RATE_WARNING_PCT=0.5
# ERROR_RATE_CRITICAL_PCT=1.0
# Reason: [Why this service has different error tolerance]
```

---

## Scaling configuration

```
# Min and max replica counts for HPA
MIN_REPLICAS_DEV=1
MIN_REPLICAS_STAGING=2
MIN_REPLICAS_PROD=3

MAX_REPLICAS_PROD=10
# Reason for max: [e.g. database connection pool limits to 20 connections]
```

---

## Kafka consumer lag SLO (if applicable)

```
# Uncomment if service consumes from Kafka
# KAFKA_LAG_WARNING_MESSAGES=1000
# KAFKA_LAG_CRITICAL_MESSAGES=10000
# Topic: [topic-name]
```

---

## On-call and escalation

```
# Slack channel for SRE Agent Tier 2 notifications
ON_CALL_CHANNEL=#[team-name]-oncall

# Tech Lead role for Tier 3 escalation
TECH_LEAD_ROLE=[team-name]-tech-lead
```

---

## Custom runbooks

[Links to Confluence runbooks specific to this service.
 SRE Agent uses these for Tier 3 diagnosis packages.]

| Scenario | Runbook URL |
|---|---|
| High error rate | [Confluence URL or "Not yet created"] |
| High latency | [Confluence URL or "Not yet created"] |
| Deployment rollback | [Confluence URL or "Not yet created"] |
